summary: Full multi-page routing testing of Sahabat Wisata Jember travel website. All 11 routes tested and working. Navigation, WA links, breadcrumbs, StickyBookingCard, FAQ accordion, forms - all functional. 100% pass rate on core features.

issues: Hero right-side image appears very light/washed out (low opacity overlay) - may be intentional but reduces visual impact

passing_tests: Homepage loads with split hero (white left, vivid image right)
Search box 4 tabs (Travel, Wisata, Armada, Rombongan) present and clickable
All homepage sections load: Services, Routes, Tours, Fleet, BookingFlow, Testimonial, FAQ, CTA, Footer
Navbar has all 6 links: Travel, Wisata, Armada, Rombongan, FAQ, Kontak
Active navbar link highlighted (confirmed Travel link active on /travel)
/travel - Travel catalog loads with 4 route cards (Jember-Surabaya, Malang, Bali, +1)
/travel/jember-surabaya - Detail page with schedules (6 times), pickup points, StickyBookingCard
/wisata - Wisata catalog loads with packages
/wisata/open-trip-bromo-sunrise - Detail with itinerary (Rundown Perjalanan) and includes
/sewa-armada - Armada catalog with fleet cards
/sewa-armada/toyota-hiace-commuter - Armada detail page loads
/rombongan - Rombongan page with inquiry form (5 inputs)
/faq - FAQ page with 5 category filters (Semua, Travel, Wisata, Armada, Pembayaran, Pemesanan) and accordion (8 items)
/kontak - Contact page with contact form (4 inputs) and contact info
Floating WhatsApp button visible on all pages
All WhatsApp buttons point to wa.me/6285732431396 (verified correct number)
Breadcrumb navigation works on inner pages (Home > Travel > Jember Surabaya verified)
StickyBookingCard visible on desktop detail pages (Travel & Wisata detail confirmed)
404 page works for unknown routes
Mobile responsive at 390px - homepage and /travel both render correctly
action_items: Minor: Hero right image appears slightly washed out on desktop - check opacity/filter settings in HeroSection.jsx
critical_code_review_comments: No critical issues found in this iteration
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 11 routes tested and working. Multi-page routing fully implemented. WA number 6285732431396 verified across all pages. FAQ accordion, breadcrumbs, StickyBookingCard, forms all working. Only minor: hero image appears slightly washed out on desktop.
